description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MinGW build that runs on push to master, ghact branches and tags matching v*.*.*, and on pull requests to master, while ignoring changes to README.md and CONTRIBUTING.md. Use a single windows-latest job with msys2 shell, check out the repository, install MinGW, gcc, and make, cache libraries, install libraries with a batch script, configure CMake with MinGW Makefiles, and build the project with cmake --build.
